api_key.description: Flexport API key, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Flexport API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-250), sent as the 'per' query param on the first request.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
